title: achillea moschata var. haussknechtiana
intro: Achillea moschata var. haussknechtiana, also known as Haussknecht's yarrow, is a plant species within the genus Achillea, characterized by its fragrant, white flowers and fern-like foliage. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Haussknecht's yarrow include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Haussknecht's yarrow can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically as a salve or ointment.
